description.content:
Controller: register
Schema: registerSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| firstName | string | Required |
| lastName | string | Required |
| email | string | Required |
| password | string | Required |
| profileImage | string | Optional |
| role | string | Optional |
| phoneNo | object | Optional |
| phoneNo.countryCode | string | Optional |
| phoneNo.number | string | Optional |

Controller: login
Schema: loginSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| email | string | Required |
| password | string | Required |

Controller: forgotPassword
Schema: forgotPasswordSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| email | string | Required |

Controller: updatePassword
Schema: updatePasswordSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| email | string | Required |
| newPassword | string | Required |
| confirmPassword | string | Required |

Controller: resetPassword
Schema: resetPasswordSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| email | string | Required |
| oldPassword | string | Required |
| newPassword | string | Required |
| confirmPassword | string | Required |

Controller: verifyOtp
Schema: verifyOtpSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| email | string | Required |
| otp | string | Required |

Controller: resendOtp
Schema: resendOtpSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| email | string | Required |

Controller: updateHeroSection
Schema: updateHeroSectionSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| title | string | Required |
| subTitles | array | Required |
| description | string | Optional |
| link | string | Optional |
| linkTitle | string | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: updateUserSection
Schema: updateUserSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| firstName | string | Optional |
| lastName | string | Optional |
| email | string | Optional |
| phoneNo | object | Optional |
| phoneNo.countryCode | string | Optional |
| phoneNo.number | string | Optional |
| password | string | Optional |
| profileImage | string | Optional |
| otp | number | Optional |
| otpExpireTime | date | Optional |
| socialMediaLinks | array | Optional |
| socialMediaLinks[].title | string | Optional |
| socialMediaLinks[].link | string | Required |
| socialMediaLinks[].icon | string | Required |
| socialMediaLinks[].isActive | boolean | Optional |
| offers | array | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: addWorkCount
Schema: addWorkCountSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| number | string | Required |
| title | string | Required |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: editWorkCount
Schema: editWorkCountSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| workCountId | string | Required |
| number | string | Optional |
| title | string | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: deleteUploadedFile
Schema: deleteImageSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| fileUrl | string | Required |

Controller: addClientLogo
Schema: addClientLogoSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| name | string | Required |
| image | string | Required |
| link | string | Required |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: editClientLogo
Schema: editClientLogoSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| clientLogoId | string | Required |
| name | string | Optional |
| image | string | Optional |
| link | string | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: addService

| Field | Type | Requirement |

| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: editService

| serviceId | string | Required |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: addOurService
Schema: addOurServiceSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| priority | number | Required |
| title | string | Required |
| shortDescription | string | Optional |
| description | string | Optional |
| thumbnailImage | string | Optional |
| serviceIds | array | Optional |
| images | array | Optional |
| tagLine | string | Optional |
| whyChoose | object | Optional |
| whyChoose.title | string | Optional |
| whyChoose.description | string | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: editOurService
Schema: editOurServiceSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| ourServiceId | string | Required |
| priority | number | Optional |
| title | string | Optional |
| shortDescription | string | Optional |
| description | string | Optional |
| thumbnailImage | string | Optional |
| serviceIds | array | Optional |
| images | array | Optional |
| tagLine | string | Optional |
| whyChoose | object | Optional |
| whyChoose.title | string | Optional |
| whyChoose.description | string | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

Controller: addPortfolio
Schema: addPortfolioSchema

| Field | Type | Requirement |

| thumbnailImage | string | Required |

| subTitle | string | Optional |
| serviceIds | array | Optional |
| isFeatured | boolean | Optional |
| link | string | Optional |
| description | string | Optional |
| images | array | Optional |
| projectName | string | Optional |
| client | string | Optional |
| technology | string | Optional |
| date | date | Optional |
| socialLinks | array | Optional |
| socialLinks[].title | string | Optional |
| socialLinks[].link | string | Required |
| socialLinks[].icon | string | Required |
| socialLinks[].isActive | boolean | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |

| Field | Type | Requirement |

| portfolioId | string | Required |
| thumbnailImage | string | Optional |
| title | string | Optional |
| subTitle | string | Optional |
| serviceIds | array | Optional |
| isFeatured | boolean | Optional |
| link | string | Optional |
| description | string | Optional |
| images | array | Optional |
| projectName | string | Optional |
| client | string | Optional |
| technology | string | Optional |
| date | date | Optional |
| socialLinks | array | Optional |
| socialLinks[].title | string | Optional |
| socialLinks[].link | string | Required |
| socialLinks[].icon | string | Required |
| socialLinks[].isActive | boolean | Optional |
| isActive | boolean | Optional |
